commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 4:41 And these recorded by name came in the days of Hezekiah king of Judah, and destroyed their tents, and the Meunim that were found there, and destroyed them utterly unto this day, and dwelt in their place: because there was pasture there for their flocks. Inhabitants. Septuagint, "and the Mineans. "Hebrew meyenim, "the inhabitants of Maon "in Arabia. See Judges x. Syriac and Arabic, "the fountains.
